data.body: POST-MERGE APPLY COMPLETE (2026-07-11, operator attestation): change 528 MERGED to main (origin/main tip 5e1a59491). terraform import + targeted apply run against live AWS (account 896586841071, us-east-1): 'Apply complete! Resources: 3 added, 1 changed, 0 destroyed'. VERIFIED live: (AC3) alarm rebar-gerrit-data-disk-high now imported into state and its AlarmActions = ['arn:aws:sns:us-east-1:896586841071:rebar-gerrit-alerts'] (previously empty — silent-alarm gap closed); (AC2a) IAM role rebar-terraform-plan created (arn:aws:iam::896586841071:role/rebar-terraform-plan) with attached ReadOnlyAccess + inline rebar-terraform-plan-kms. A re-run targeted terraform plan shows no further changes for these resources. (AC2b) terraform-drift.yml workflow merged and can now assume the role. (AC1) SNS subscription confirmed (prior comment). All four ACs met end-to-end.
